Access-Control-1.name: Access-Control-1
Access-Control-1.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<AccessControl async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="Access-Control-1">
    <DisplayName>Access Control-1</DisplayName>
    <IgnoreTrueClientIPHeader>true</IgnoreTrueClientIPHeader>
    <Properties/>
    <IPRules noRuleMatchAction="ALLOW">
        <MatchRule action="DENY">
            <SourceAddress mask="24">{private.ip1}</SourceAddress>
        </MatchRule>
        <MatchRule action="DENY">
            <SourceAddress mask="24">{private.ip2}</SourceAddress>
        </MatchRule>
        <MatchRule action="DENY">
            <SourceAddress mask="24">{private.ip3}</SourceAddress>
        </MatchRule>
        <MatchRule action="DENY">
            <SourceAddress mask="24">{private.ip4}</SourceAddress>
        </MatchRule>
        <MatchRule action="DENY">
            <SourceAddress mask="24">{private.ip5}</SourceAddress>
        </MatchRule>
        <MatchRule action="DENY">
            <SourceAddress mask="24">{private.ip6}</SourceAddress>
        </MatchRule>
        <MatchRule action="DENY">
            <SourceAddress mask="24">{private.ip7}</SourceAddress>
        </MatchRule>
        <MatchRule action="DENY">
            <SourceAddress mask="24">{private.ip8}</SourceAddress>
        </MatchRule>
        <MatchRule action="DENY">
            <SourceAddress mask="24">{private.ip9}</SourceAddress>
        </MatchRule>
        <MatchRule action="DENY">
            <SourceAddress mask="24">{private.ip10}</SourceAddress>
        </MatchRule>
        <MatchRule action="DENY">
            <SourceAddress mask="24">{private.ip11}</SourceAddress>
        </MatchRule>
        <MatchRule action="DENY">
            <SourceAddress mask="24">{private.ip12}</SourceAddress>
        </MatchRule>
        <MatchRule action="DENY">
            <SourceAddress mask="24">{private.ip13}</SourceAddress>
        </MatchRule>
        <MatchRule action="DENY">
            <SourceAddress mask="24">{private.ip14}</SourceAddress>
        </MatchRule>
        <MatchRule action="DENY">
            <SourceAddress mask="24">{private.ip15}</SourceAddress>
        </MatchRule>
        <MatchRule action="DENY">
            <SourceAddress mask="24">{private.ip16}</SourceAddress>
        </MatchRule>
        <MatchRule action="DENY">
            <SourceAddress mask="24">{private.ip17}</SourceAddress>
        </MatchRule>
    </IPRules>
</AccessControl>

JSON-Threat-Protection-1.name: JSON-Threat-Protection-1
JSON-Threat-Protection-1.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<JSONThreatProtection async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="JSON-Threat-Protection-1">
    <DisplayName>JSON Threat Protection-1</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <ArrayElementCount>32768</ArrayElementCount>
    <ContainerDepth>50</ContainerDepth>
    <ObjectEntryCount>500</ObjectEntryCount>
    <ObjectEntryNameLength>255</ObjectEntryNameLength>
    <Source>request</Source>
    <StringValueLength>2000000</StringValueLength>
</JSONThreatProtection>

Key-Value-Map-Operations-dbrx.name: Key-Value-Map-Operations-dbrx
Key-Value-Map-Operations-dbrx.raw_xml:

    <DisplayName>Key Value Map Operations-dbrx</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <ExclusiveCache>false</ExclusiveCache>
    <ExpiryTimeInSecs>60</ExpiryTimeInSecs>
    <Get assignTo="private.ip1" index="1">

    <Get assignTo="private.ip9" index="1">

        </Key>
    </Get>
    <Get assignTo="private.ip10" index="1">
        <Key>
            <Parameter>dbrx-access-control-ip10</Parameter>

    <Scope>environment</Scope>

OWASP10_Protect_JSON.name: OWASP10_Protect_JSON
OWASP10_Protect_JSON.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<JSONThreatProtection async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="OWASP10_Protect_JSON">
    <DisplayName>OWASP10_Protect_JSON</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <ArrayElementCount>20</ArrayElementCount>
    <ContainerDepth>10</ContainerDepth>
    <ObjectEntryCount>15</ObjectEntryCount>
    <ObjectEntryNameLength>50</ObjectEntryNameLength>
    <Source>request</Source>
    <StringValueLength>500</StringValueLength>
</JSONThreatProtection>

OWASP10_Protect_SQL.name: OWASP10_Protect_SQL
OWASP10_Protect_SQL.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<RegularExpressionProtection async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="OWASP10_Protect_SQL">
    <DisplayName>OWASP10_Protect_SQL</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <Source>request</Source>
    <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>false</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
    <QueryParam name="threatParam">
        <Pattern>[\s]*((delete)|(exec)|(drop)|(/)|(drop\s*table)|(insert)|(shutdown)|(update)|(\bor\b))</Pattern>
    </QueryParam>
</RegularExpressionProtection>

QuotaPerCustomerApp.name: QuotaPerCustomerApp
QuotaPerCustomerApp.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<Quota continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="QuotaPerCustomerApp" type="calendar">
    <DisplayName>QuotaPerCustomerApp</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <Allow countRef="verifyapikey.Verify-API-Key.apiproduct.developer.quota.limit" count="60"/>
    <Interval ref="verifyapikey.Verify-API-Key.apiproduct.developer.quota.interval">1</Interval>
    <TimeUnit ref="verifyapikey.Verify-API-Key.apiproduct.developer.quota.timeunit">minute</TimeUnit>
    <Identifier ref="verifyapikey.Verify-API-Key.client_id"/>
    <Distributed>true</Distributed>
    <Synchronous>true</Synchronous>
    <StartTime>2019-01-01 12:00:00</StartTime>
</Quota>

SA_DDoS.name: SA_DDoS
SA_DDoS.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<SpikeArrest async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="SA_DDoS">
    <DisplayName>SA_DDoS</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <Identifier ref="request.header.apikey"/>
    <MessageWeight ref="request.header.weight"/>
    <Rate>100ps</Rate>
</SpikeArrest>

Verify-API-Key.name: Verify-API-Key
Verify-API-Key.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<VerifyAPIKey async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="Verify-API-Key">
    <DisplayName>Verify API Key</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <APIKey ref="private.normalized_api_key"/>
</VerifyAPIKey>
